TITLE: Laravel Multi-Cart Package - Complete Documentation for LLM Training
DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive documentation of the Laravel Multi-Cart package, a flexible shopping cart solution for Laravel applications with multiple cart instances, configurable storage providers, and advanced features.
SOURCE: https://github.com/hcart/laravel-multi-cart
LANGUAGE: Mixed (PHP, Bash, JSON, Configuration)

========================================
PACKAGE OVERVIEW
========================================

Laravel Multi-Cart is a modern, flexible shopping cart package for Laravel 11+ and PHP 8.2+ that provides:

- Multiple named cart instances (shopping, wishlist, favorites, etc.)
- Configurable storage providers (session, cache, database, Redis, file)
- Polymorphic relationships with any Eloquent model
- Advanced tax and shipping calculations
- PHP 8+ attributes for configuration
- Comprehensive event system
- Bulk operations support
- User integration with traits
- Performance optimizations

========================================
INSTALLATION AND SETUP
========================================

TITLE: Install Laravel Multi-Cart Package
DESCRIPTION: Complete installation process for the Laravel Multi-Cart package including Composer installation, configuration publishing, and database setup.
LANGUAGE: bash

```bash
# Install via Composer
composer require hcart/laravel-multi-cart

# Publish configuration file
php artisan vendor:publish --tag="laravel-multi-cart-config"

# Publish and run migrations (for database provider)
php artisan cart:publish-migrations
php artisan migrate

# Set environment variables
echo "LARAVEL_MULTI_CART_PROVIDER=session" >> .env
echo "LARAVEL_MULTI_CART_TAX_RATE=0.08" >> .env
echo "LARAVEL_MULTI_CART_CURRENCY=USD" >> .env
```

========================================
CONFIGURATION
========================================

TITLE: Laravel Multi-Cart Configuration File
DESCRIPTION: Complete configuration file showing all available options for the Laravel Multi-Cart package including providers, models, callbacks, and cleanup settings.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
<?php
// config/laravel-multi-cart.php

return [
    // Default storage provider
    'default' => env('LARAVEL_MULTI_CART_PROVIDER', 'session'),
    
    // Custom models (extend these for customization)
    'models' => [
        'cart' => \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Models\Cart::class,
        'cart_item' => \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Models\CartItem::class,
    ],
    
    // Configuration class
    'config_class' => \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Config\LaravelMultiCartConfig::class,
    
    // Behavioral callbacks
    'callbacks' => [
        // Custom item uniqueness logic
        'unique_item' => null, // function($cartableId, $cartableType, $attributes) { return 'unique_key'; }
        // Callback when item is updated
        'item_update' => null, // function($cartItem, $oldData, $newData) { /* custom logic */ }
        // Callback when item is removed
        'item_remove' => null, // function($cartItem) { /* custom logic */ }
    ],
    
    // Cart behavior settings
    'prevent_duplicates' => true,
    'tax_rate' => env('LARAVEL_MULTI_CART_TAX_RATE', 0.0),
    'currency' => env('LARAVEL_MULTI_CART_CURRENCY', 'USD'),
    
    // Storage provider configurations
    'providers' => [
        'session' => [
            'driver' => 'session',
            'prefix' => 'laravel_multi_cart_'
        ],
        'cache' => [
            'driver' => 'cache',
            'store' => env('CACHE_DRIVER', 'file'),
            'prefix' => 'laravel_multi_cart_',
            'ttl' => 3600
        ],
        'database' => [
            'driver' => 'database',
            'connection' => env('DB_CONNECTION', 'mysql'),
            'soft_deletes' => true
        ],
        'redis' => [
            'driver' => 'redis',
            'connection' => env('REDIS_CONNECTION', 'default'),
            'prefix' => 'laravel_multi_cart_',
            'ttl' => 3600
        ],
        'file' => [
            'driver' => 'file',
            'path' => storage_path('laravel_multi_cart'),
            'ttl' => 3600
        ]
    ],
    
    // Automatic cleanup settings
    'cleanup' => [
        'enabled' => true,
        'schedule' => 'daily',
        'expire_after' => 168 // hours (7 days)
    ]
];
```

========================================
BASIC USAGE PATTERNS
========================================

TITLE: Basic Cart Operations
DESCRIPTION: Fundamental cart operations including creating carts, adding items, and managing cart contents.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
use HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Facades\LaravelMultiCart;

// Get or create a cart
$cart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('shopping');

// Create cart with specific provider
$cart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('wishlist', 'database');

// Add items to cart
$product = Product::find(1);
$cart->add($product, 2); // Add 2 quantities

// Add with custom attributes
$cart->add($product, 1, [
    'size' => 'large',
    'color' => 'red',
    'gift_wrap' => true
]);

// Add with custom price
$cart->add($product, 1, [], 19.99);

// Get cart information
$itemCount = $cart->count();
$subtotal = $cart->subtotal();
$tax = $cart->tax();
$total = $cart->total();

// Get all items
$items = $cart->items();

// Update item
$cart->update($itemId, [
    'quantity' => 5,
    'price' => 24.99,
    'attributes' => ['color' => 'blue']
]);

// Remove item
$cart->remove($itemId);

// Clear all items
$cart->clear();

// Delete cart
$cart->delete();
```

TITLE: Bulk Operations
DESCRIPTION: Adding multiple items to cart in a single operation for optimal performance.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
// Bulk add items to cart
$cart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('bulk_cart');
$items = [
    ['cartable' => $product1, 'quantity' => 2, 'attributes' => ['color' => 'red']],
    ['cartable' => $product2, 'quantity' => 3, 'attributes' => ['color' => 'blue']],
    ['cartable' => $product3, 'quantity' => 1, 'price' => 15.99], // Custom price
];
$cart->addBulk($items);

// Advanced bulk operations with tax and shipping
$items = [
    [
        'cartable' => $product1,
        'quantity' => 3,
        'price' => 12.99,
        'attributes' => [
            'color' => 'red',
            'size' => 'large',
            'tax_settings' => [
                'type' => 'percentage',
                'value' => 8.5,
                'enabled' => true,
            ],
            'shipping_settings' => [
                'type' => 'per_piece',
                'value' => 4.0,
                'pieces_per_shipping' => 2,
                'max_shipping_charges' => 3,
                'enabled' => true,
            ],
        ],
    ],
];
$cart->addBulk($items);
```

========================================
USER INTEGRATION
========================================

TITLE: User Model Integration with HasCarts Trait
DESCRIPTION: Integrating the HasCarts trait into User models for seamless user-cart management.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable;
use HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Traits\HasCarts;

class User extends Authenticatable
{
    use HasCarts;
    
    // ... other model code
}

// Usage examples
$user = auth()->user();

// Create user-specific cart
$cart = $user->createCart('shopping', ['currency' => 'EUR']);

// Get user's cart
$cart = $user->getCart('shopping');

// Get cart with specific provider
$cart = $user->getCart('wishlist', 'database');

// Check if user has cart
if ($user->hasCart('favorites')) {
    $favorites = $user->getCart('favorites');
}

// Get all user cart names
$cartNames = $user->getCartNames();

// Clone user's cart
$clonedCart = $user->cloneCart('shopping', 'shopping_backup');

// Delete user cart
$user->deleteCart('shopping');

// Get user's carts relationship
$userCarts = $user->carts; // Returns Eloquent collection
```

========================================
CARTABLE ITEMS
========================================

TITLE: Product Model with Cartable Trait
DESCRIPTION: Implementing the Cartable trait on models to make them cart-compatible with required methods.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Traits\Cartable;

class Product extends Model
{
    use Cartable;
    
    // Required method for cart integration
    public function getCartPrice(): float
    {
        return (float) $this->price;
    }
    
    // Optional: Custom cart name
    public function getCartName(): string
    {
        return $this->name;
    }
    
    // Optional: Additional attributes for cart
    public function getCartAttributes(): array
    {
        return [
            'sku' => $this->sku,
            'weight' => $this->weight,
        ];
    }
}

// Usage with cartable items
$product = Product::find(1);

// Check if product is in any cart
if ($product->isInCart()) {
    // Product is in at least one cart
}

// Check if product is in specific cart
if ($product->isInCart('wishlist')) {
    // Product is in wishlist
}

// Get total quantity across all carts
$totalQuantity = $product->getCartQuantity();

// Get quantity in specific cart
$wishlistQuantity = $product->getCartQuantity('wishlist');

// Remove from all carts
$product->removeFromCart();

// Remove from specific cart
$product->removeFromCart('shopping');
```

========================================
PHP ATTRIBUTES FOR TAX AND SHIPPING
========================================

TITLE: PHP Attributes for Tax Configuration
DESCRIPTION: Using PHP 8+ attributes to configure tax settings directly on model classes.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
use HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Attributes\TaxConfiguration;

#[TaxConfiguration(
    rate: 0.08,
    type: 'percentage',
    included: false,
    compound: false,
    category: 'standard'
)]
class Product extends Model
{
    use Cartable;
    
    // Method-level attributes override class-level
    #[TaxConfiguration(rate: 0.15, type: 'percentage')]
    public function getTaxRate(): float
    {
        return 0.15;
    }
    
    public function getCartPrice(): float
    {
        return $this->price;
    }
}
```

TITLE: PHP Attributes for Shipping Configuration
DESCRIPTION: Using PHP 8+ attributes to configure shipping settings including piece-based shipping.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
use HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Attributes\ShippingConfiguration;

#[ShippingConfiguration(
    cost: 5.99,
    type: 'per_piece',
    piecesPerShipping: 2,
    maxShippingCharges: 3,
    freeShippingThreshold: 100.0
)]
class Product extends Model
{
    use Cartable;
    
    public function getCartPrice(): float
    {
        return $this->price;
    }
}
```

========================================
INTERFACE IMPLEMENTATIONS
========================================

TITLE: Implementing TaxableInterface and ShippableInterface
DESCRIPTION: Advanced tax and shipping configuration using interface implementations for complex business logic.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
use HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Contracts\TaxableInterface;
use HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Contracts\ShippableInterface;

class Product extends Model implements TaxableInterface, ShippableInterface
{
    use Cartable;
    
    // TaxableInterface implementation
    public function getTaxSettings(): array
    {
        return [
            'type' => 'percentage',
            'value' => 8.5,
            'included' => false,
            'compound' => false,
        ];
    }
    
    public function getTaxRate(): float { return 8.5; }
    public function getTaxType(): string { return 'percentage'; }
    public function isTaxIncluded(): bool { return false; }
    public function isCompoundTax(): bool { return false; }
    public function getTaxCategory(): ?string { return 'standard'; }
    
    // ShippableInterface implementation
    public function getShippingSettings(): array
    {
        return [
            'type' => 'per_piece',
            'value' => 5.0,
            'pieces_per_shipping' => 2,
            'max_shipping_charges' => 3,
        ];
    }
    
    public function getShippingCost(): float { return 5.0; }
    public function getShippingType(): string { return 'per_piece'; }
    public function isShippingIncluded(): bool { return false; }
    public function getShippingWeight(): float { return 1.0; }
    public function getShippingDimensions(): array
    {
        return ['length' => 10, 'width' => 8, 'height' => 5];
    }
    public function getShippingClass(): ?string { return 'standard'; }
    public function getShippingZones(): array { return ['US', 'CA']; }
    public function getPiecesPerShipping(): int { return 2; }
    public function getMaxShippingCharges(): ?int { return 3; }
    public function qualifiesForFreeShipping(float $cartTotal): bool
    {
        return $cartTotal >= 100.0;
    }
    
    public function getCartPrice(): float { return $this->price; }
}
```

========================================
ADVANCED CONFIGURATION
========================================

TITLE: Custom Configuration with Callbacks
DESCRIPTION: Advanced configuration using custom callbacks for item uniqueness, updates, and removals.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
use HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Config\LaravelMultiCartConfig;

$config = new LaravelMultiCartConfig([
    'models' => [
        'cart' => \App\Models\CustomCart::class,
        'cart_item' => \App\Models\CustomCartItem::class,
    ],
    'callbacks' => [
        'unique_item' => function ($cartableId, $cartableType, $attributes) {
            // Include size and color in uniqueness
            $uniqueKey = $cartableId . $cartableType;
            if (isset($attributes['size'])) {
                $uniqueKey .= $attributes['size'];
            }
            if (isset($attributes['color'])) {
                $uniqueKey .= $attributes['color'];
            }
            return md5($uniqueKey);
        },
        'item_update' => function ($cartItem, $oldData, $newData) {
            // Log item updates
            \Log::info('Cart item updated', [
                'cart_id' => $cartItem['cart_id'] ?? null,
                'item_id' => $cartItem['id'],
                'old_data' => $oldData,
                'new_data' => $newData
            ]);
        },
        'item_remove' => function ($cartItem) {
            // Log item removals
            \Log::info('Cart item removed', [
                'cart_id' => $cartItem['cart_id'] ?? null,
                'item_id' => $cartItem['id'],
                'cartable_type' => $cartItem['cartable_type'],
                'cartable_id' => $cartItem['cartable_id'],
            ]);
        },
    ],
    'prevent_duplicates' => true,
    'tax_rate' => 0.08,
    'currency' => 'EUR'
]);

// Apply configuration to specific cart
$cart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('custom_cart')->withConfig($config);

// Set global configuration
LaravelMultiCart::setConfig($config);
```

========================================
STORAGE PROVIDERS
========================================

TITLE: Using Different Storage Providers
DESCRIPTION: Examples of using different storage providers for various use cases and performance requirements.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
// Session Provider - Best for guest users
$guestCart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('guest_cart', 'session');

// Database Provider - Best for persistent user carts
$userCart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('user_cart', 'database');
$userCart->forUser($user); // Associate with user

// Cache Provider - Best for high-performance scenarios
$fastCart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('fast_cart', 'cache');

// Redis Provider - Best for distributed applications
$distributedCart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('distributed_cart', 'redis');

// File Provider - Best for simple applications
$fileCart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('file_cart', 'file');

// Convert between providers
$convertedCart = $cart->convertToProvider('database');

// Clone to different provider
$clonedCart = $cart->clone('backup_cart', 'redis');
```

========================================
TAX AND SHIPPING CALCULATIONS
========================================

TITLE: Advanced Tax and Shipping Calculations
DESCRIPTION: Complex tax and shipping calculations including piece-based shipping and various tax types.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
// Piece-based shipping calculation
$cart->add($product, 7, [
    'shipping_settings' => [
        'type' => 'per_piece',
        'value' => 4.0,                    // Cost per shipping group
        'pieces_per_shipping' => 2,        // Every 2 pieces = 1 shipping charge
        'max_shipping_charges' => 3,       // Maximum 3 shipping charges
        'enabled' => true,
    ]
]);
// Calculation: ceil(7/2) = 4 groups, but max 3, so 3 × $4.0 = $12.0

// Different shipping types
$shippingConfigs = [
    // Fixed shipping
    'fixed' => [
        'type' => 'fixed',
        'value' => 9.99,
    ],
    
    // Percentage-based shipping
    'percentage' => [
        'type' => 'percentage',
        'value' => 5.0, // 5% of item price
    ],
    
    // Weight-based shipping
    'weight_based' => [
        'type' => 'weight_based',
        'base_rate' => 5.0,
        'weight_rate' => 2.0,           // $2 per unit weight
        'free_weight_threshold' => 10.0, // Free under 10 units
    ],
];

// Tax calculations
$taxConfigs = [
    // Percentage tax
    'percentage' => [
        'type' => 'percentage',
        'value' => 8.5,
        'included' => false,
        'compound' => false,
    ],
    
    // Fixed tax
    'fixed' => [
        'type' => 'fixed',
        'value' => 2.50,
        'included' => false,
    ],
    
    // Compound tax
    'compound' => [
        'type' => 'percentage',
        'value' => 5.0,
        'included' => false,
        'compound' => true,
    ],
];

// Get totals
$subtotal = $cart->subtotal();
$tax = $cart->totalTax();
$shipping = $cart->totalShipping();
$total = $cart->total();
```

========================================
EVENT SYSTEM
========================================

TITLE: Cart and Item Events
DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive event system for cart operations with event listeners and handlers.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
// Available events
$events = [
    // Cart events
    \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Events\CartCreated::class,
    \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Events\CartUpdated::class,
    \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Events\CartDeleted::class,
    
    // Item events
    \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Events\ItemAdded::class,
    \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Events\ItemUpdated::class,
    \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Events\ItemRemoved::class,
];

// Event listener example
<?php

namespace App\Listeners;

use HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Events\ItemAdded;

class LogItemAdded
{
    public function handle(ItemAdded $event)
    {
        \Log::info('Item added to cart', [
            'cart_name' => $event->cartName,
            'cartable_type' => $event->cartableType,
            'cartable_id' => $event->cartableId,
            'quantity' => $event->quantity,
            'price' => $event->price,
            'attributes' => $event->attributes,
        ]);
    }
}

// Register in EventServiceProvider
protected $listen = [
    \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Events\ItemAdded::class => [
        \App\Listeners\LogItemAdded::class,
    ],
    \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Events\CartCreated::class => [
        \App\Listeners\SendCartCreatedNotification::class,
    ],
];
```

========================================
ARTISAN COMMANDS
========================================

TITLE: Laravel Multi-Cart Artisan Commands
DESCRIPTION: Available Artisan commands for cart management, cleanup, and provider migration.
LANGUAGE: bash

```bash
# Cleanup expired carts
php artisan cart:cleanup

# Migrate between providers
php artisan cart:migrate-provider session database

# Force migration without confirmation
php artisan cart:migrate-provider session database --force

# Publish migrations
php artisan cart:publish-migrations

# Publish configuration
php artisan vendor:publish --tag="laravel-multi-cart-config"

# Publish all package assets
php artisan vendor:publish --provider="HCart\LaravelMultiCart\LaravelMultiCartServiceProvider"
```

========================================
REAL-WORLD EXAMPLES
========================================

TITLE: E-commerce Shopping Cart Implementation
DESCRIPTION: Complete e-commerce shopping cart implementation with user authentication, checkout process, and order creation.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
// E-commerce shopping cart workflow
class ShoppingCartController extends Controller
{
    public function addToCart(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate([
            'product_id' => 'required|exists:products,id',
            'quantity' => 'required|integer|min:1',
            'attributes' => 'sometimes|array',
        ]);
        
        $product = Product::findOrFail($request->product_id);
        $cart = auth()->user()->getCart('shopping', 'database');
        
        $cart->add($product, $request->quantity, $request->attributes ?? []);
        
        return response()->json([
            'message' => 'Product added to cart',
            'cart_count' => $cart->count(),
            'cart_total' => $cart->total(),
        ]);
    }
    
    public function checkout(Request $request)
    {
        $user = auth()->user();
        $cart = $user->getCart('shopping', 'database');
        
        if ($cart->count() === 0) {
            return redirect()->back()->with('error', 'Cart is empty');
        }
        
        DB::transaction(function () use ($cart, $user) {
            // Create order
            $order = Order::create([
                'user_id' => $user->id,
                'subtotal' => $cart->subtotal(),
                'tax' => $cart->totalTax(),
                'shipping' => $cart->totalShipping(),
                'total' => $cart->total(),
                'status' => 'pending',
            ]);
            
            // Add order items
            foreach ($cart->items() as $item) {
                $order->items()->create([
                    'product_id' => $item['cartable_id'],
                    'quantity' => $item['quantity'],
                    'price' => $item['price'],
                    'attributes' => $item['attributes'],
                ]);
            }
            
            // Clear cart after successful order
            $cart->clear();
            
            // Send confirmation email
            Mail::to($user)->send(new OrderConfirmation($order));
        });
        
        return redirect()->route('orders.show', $order);
    }
}
```

TITLE: Guest to User Cart Migration
DESCRIPTION: Seamless migration of guest cart contents to user account upon login or registration.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
// Guest to user cart migration
class AuthController extends Controller
{
    public function login(Request $request)
    {
        $credentials = $request->validate([
            'email' => 'required|email',
            'password' => 'required',
        ]);
        
        if (Auth::attempt($credentials)) {
            $user = Auth::user();
            
            // Migrate guest cart to user cart
            $this->migrateGuestCart($user);
            
            return redirect()->intended('/dashboard');
        }
        
        return back()->withErrors([
            'email' => 'The provided credentials do not match our records.',
        ]);
    }
    
    private function migrateGuestCart(User $user)
    {
        // Get guest cart from session
        $guestCart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('guest_shopping', 'session');
        
        if ($guestCart->count() === 0) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Get or create user cart
        $userCart = $user->getCart('shopping', 'database');
        
        // Merge guest cart into user cart
        $guestItems = $guestCart->items()->toArray();
        $userCart->addBulk(array_map(function ($item) {
            $cartableModel = $item['cartable_type'];
            $cartable = $cartableModel::find($item['cartable_id']);
            
            return [
                'cartable' => $cartable,
                'quantity' => $item['quantity'],
                'price' => $item['price'],
                'attributes' => $item['attributes'],
            ];
        }, $guestItems));
        
        // Clear guest cart
        $guestCart->delete();
    }
}
```

TITLE: Multi-tenant Cart System
DESCRIPTION: Implementation of multi-tenant cart system with tenant isolation and custom configuration.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
// Multi-tenant cart implementation
class TenantCartService
{
    public function getCartForTenant(string $cartName, int $tenantId): CartService
    {
        $config = new LaravelMultiCartConfig([
            'callbacks' => [
                'unique_item' => function ($cartableId, $cartableType, $attributes) use ($tenantId) {
                    // Include tenant ID in uniqueness calculation
                    $uniqueKey = $tenantId . $cartableId . $cartableType;
                    if (!empty($attributes)) {
                        ksort($attributes);
                        $uniqueKey .= json_encode($attributes);
                    }
                    return md5($uniqueKey);
                },
            ],
            'tax_rate' => $this->getTenantTaxRate($tenantId),
            'currency' => $this->getTenantCurrency($tenantId),
        ]);
        
        return LaravelMultiCart::cart($cartName . '_tenant_' . $tenantId, 'database')
            ->withConfig($config);
    }
    
    private function getTenantTaxRate(int $tenantId): float
    {
        return Tenant::find($tenantId)->tax_rate ?? 0.0;
    }
    
    private function getTenantCurrency(int $tenantId): string
    {
        return Tenant::find($tenantId)->currency ?? 'USD';
    }
}

// Usage in controller
class TenantCartController extends Controller
{
    public function addToCart(Request $request, TenantCartService $cartService)
    {
        $tenantId = auth()->user()->tenant_id;
        $cart = $cartService->getCartForTenant('shopping', $tenantId);
        
        $product = Product::where('tenant_id', $tenantId)
            ->findOrFail($request->product_id);
        
        $cart->add($product, $request->quantity, $request->attributes ?? []);
        
        return response()->json(['success' => true]);
    }
}
```

========================================
PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION
========================================

TITLE: Performance Optimization Strategies
DESCRIPTION: Best practices and optimization strategies for high-performance cart operations.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
// Performance optimization examples

// 1. Use appropriate storage provider
// For high-traffic applications, use Redis or Cache
$cart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('high_traffic_cart', 'redis');

// 2. Bulk operations for multiple items
$items = collect($productIds)->map(function ($productId) {
    return [
        'cartable' => Product::find($productId),
        'quantity' => 1,
        'attributes' => ['bulk_added' => true],
    ];
})->toArray();

$cart->addBulk($items); // Single transaction, better performance

// 3. Eager loading for cart items with relationships
$cart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('optimized_cart', 'database');
$items = $cart->items()->with('cartable')->get();

// 4. Caching expensive calculations
$cacheKey = "cart_total_{$cart->getName()}_{$cart->getCartId()}";
$total = Cache::remember($cacheKey, 300, function () use ($cart) {
    return $cart->total();
});

// 5. Database query optimization
// Use database provider with proper indexing
Schema::table('carts', function (Blueprint $table) {
    $table->index(['name', 'user_id']);
    $table->index(['session_id']);
    $table->index(['expires_at']);
});

Schema::table('cart_items', function (Blueprint $table) {
    $table->index(['cart_id']);
    $table->index(['cartable_id', 'cartable_type']);
});
```

========================================
TESTING EXAMPLES
========================================

TITLE: Comprehensive Testing Examples
DESCRIPTION: Examples of testing cart functionality including unit tests, integration tests, and feature tests.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
// Feature test example
class CartFeatureTest extends TestCase
{
    use RefreshDatabase;
    
    public function test_user_can_add_items_to_cart()
    {
        $user = User::factory()->create();
        $product = Product::factory()->create(['price' => 19.99]);
        
        $this->actingAs($user)
            ->postJson('/api/cart/add', [
                'product_id' => $product->id,
                'quantity' => 2,
                'attributes' => ['color' => 'red'],
            ])
            ->assertJson([
                'message' => 'Product added to cart',
                'cart_count' => 2,
            ]);
        
        $cart = $user->getCart('shopping');
        $this->assertEquals(2, $cart->count());
        $this->assertEquals(39.98, $cart->subtotal());
    }
    
    public function test_guest_cart_migrates_to_user_on_login()
    {
        $product = Product::factory()->create();
        
        // Add to guest cart
        $guestCart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('guest_shopping', 'session');
        $guestCart->add($product, 1);
        
        // Create and login user
        $user = User::factory()->create();
        $this->actingAs($user);
        
        // Simulate cart migration
        $userCart = $user->getCart('shopping', 'database');
        foreach ($guestCart->items() as $item) {
            $userCart->add($product, $item['quantity']);
        }
        
        $this->assertEquals(1, $userCart->count());
        $guestCart->delete();
    }
}

// Unit test example
class CartServiceTest extends TestCase
{
    public function test_cart_calculates_totals_correctly()
    {
        $cart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('test_cart');
        $product = new Product(['id' => 1, 'price' => 10.00]);
        
        $cart->add($product, 2);
        
        $this->assertEquals(20.00, $cart->subtotal());
        $this->assertEquals(0.00, $cart->tax()); // No tax configured
        $this->assertEquals(20.00, $cart->total());
    }
    
    public function test_bulk_add_handles_duplicates_correctly()
    {
        $cart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('bulk_test');
        $product = new Product(['id' => 1, 'price' => 15.00]);
        
        $items = [
            ['cartable' => $product, 'quantity' => 2, 'attributes' => ['color' => 'red']],
            ['cartable' => $product, 'quantity' => 3, 'attributes' => ['color' => 'blue']],
        ];
        
        $cart->addBulk($items);
        
        $this->assertEquals(2, $cart->items()->count()); // Two separate items
        $this->assertEquals(5, $cart->count()); // Total quantity
    }
}
```

DEPLOYMENT CHECKLIST
========================================

TITLE: Package Deployment Checklist
DESCRIPTION: Complete checklist for deploying the Laravel Multi-Cart package including configuration, security, and performance considerations.
LANGUAGE: markdown

```markdown
# Laravel Multi-Cart Package Deployment Checklist

## Pre-Deployment
- [ ] All tests passing (183 tests, 545 assertions)
- [ ] Code coverage above 90%
- [ ] PHPStan analysis passing
- [ ] Code style checks passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Changelog updated
- [ ] Version tagged in git

## Configuration
- [ ] Environment variables set
- [ ] Storage provider configured
- [ ] Database migrations published and run
- [ ] Cache configuration optimized
- [ ] Queue configuration for events (if needed)

## Security
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] CSRF protection enabled
- [ ] User authorization checks
- [ ] Rate limiting configured
- [ ] Sensitive data encrypted

## Performance
- [ ] Database indexes created
- [ ] Caching strategy implemented
- [ ] Query optimization verified
- [ ] Memory usage profiled
- [ ] Load testing completed

## Monitoring
- [ ] Error tracking configured
- [ ] Performance monitoring setup
- [ ] Log levels configured
- [ ] Health checks implemented
- [ ] Backup strategy in place

## Post-Deployment
- [ ] Smoke tests executed
- [ ] Performance metrics baseline
- [ ] Documentation accessible
- [ ] Support channels established
- [ ] Rollback plan tested
```

========================================
API REFERENCE
========================================

TITLE: Complete API Reference
DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive API reference for all public methods and interfaces in the Laravel Multi-Cart package.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
// CartService API
interface CartServiceAPI
{
    // Core operations
    public function add(Model $cartable, int $quantity = 1, array $attributes = [], ?float $price = null): self;
    public function addBulk(array $items): self;
    public function update(string|int $itemId, array $data): self;
    public function remove(string|int $itemId): bool;
    public function clear(): bool;
    
    // Information methods
    public function count(): int;
    public function total(): float;
    public function subtotal(): float;
    public function tax(): float;
    public function totalTax(): float;
    public function totalShipping(): float;
    public function items(): Collection;
    public function get(string|int $itemId): ?array;
    public function has(Model $cartable): bool;
    public function quantity(Model $cartable): int;
    
    // Cart management
    public function exists(): bool;
    public function delete(): bool;
    public function clone(string $newCartName, ?string $provider = null): self;
    public function convertToProvider(string $newProvider): self;
    
    // Configuration
    public function setConfig(array $config): self;
    public function getConfig(): array;
    public function withConfig(CartConfigInterface $config): self;
    public function getCartConfig(): CartConfigInterface;
    
    // User association
    public function forUser(Model $user): self;
    public function forSession(string $sessionId): self;
    public function getUser(): ?Model;
    public function getCartId(): ?int;
    
    // Meta information
    public function getName(): string;
    public function getProvider(): string;
    
    // Tax and shipping
    public function setItemTax(string|int $itemId, array $taxSettings): self;
    public function setItemShipping(string|int $itemId, array $shippingSettings): self;
}

// HasCarts Trait Methods
trait HasCartsAPI
{
    public function carts(): HasMany;
    public function getCart(string $name, ?string $provider = null): CartService;
    public function createCart(string $name, array $config = [], ?string $provider = null): CartService;
    public function deleteCart(string $name): bool;
    public function getCartNames(): array;
    public function hasCart(string $name): bool;
    public function cloneCart(string $from, string $to, ?string $provider = null): CartService;
    public function convertCartToProvider(string $cartName, string $provider): CartService;
}

// Cartable Trait Methods
trait CartableAPI
{
    public function cartItems(): MorphMany;
    public function isInCart(?string $cartName = null): bool;
    public function getCartQuantity(?string $cartName = null): int;
    public function removeFromCart(?string $cartName = null): bool;
    
    // Required implementations
    public function getCartPrice(): float;
    public function getCartName(): string;
    public function getCartAttributes(): array;
}
```

========================================
TROUBLESHOOTING
========================================

TITLE: Common Issues and Solutions
DESCRIPTION: Common problems encountered when using the Laravel Multi-Cart package and their solutions.
LANGUAGE: php

```php
// Common issues and solutions

// Issue 1: Items not being treated as unique with different attributes
// Solution: Configure custom unique callback
$config = new LaravelMultiCartConfig([
    'callbacks' => [
        'unique_item' => function ($cartableId, $cartableType, $attributes) {
            $uniqueKey = $cartableId . $cartableType;
            if (!empty($attributes)) {
                ksort($attributes);
                $uniqueKey .= json_encode($attributes);
            }
            return md5($uniqueKey);
        },
    ],
]);

// Issue 2: Database provider not persisting user association
// Solution: Ensure proper user association
$cart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('shopping', 'database');
$cart->forUser(auth()->user()); // Important: Associate with user

// Issue 3: Tax/shipping not calculating correctly
// Solution: Verify interface implementations or attribute configurations
class Product implements TaxableInterface, ShippableInterface
{
    // Implement all required methods
    public function getTaxRate(): float { return 0.08; }
    public function getShippingCost(): float { return 5.99; }
    // ... other methods
}

// Issue 4: Performance issues with large carts
// Solution: Use appropriate provider and bulk operations
$cart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('large_cart', 'redis'); // Use Redis for performance
$cart->addBulk($items); // Use bulk operations

// Issue 5: Events not firing
// Solution: Ensure event listeners are registered
// In EventServiceProvider
protected $listen = [
    \HCart\LaravelMultiCart\Events\ItemAdded::class => [
        \App\Listeners\LogItemAdded::class,
    ],
];

// Issue 6: Configuration not persisting
// Solution: Use database provider for persistent configuration
$cart = LaravelMultiCart::cart('persistent_cart', 'database');
$cart->setConfig(['tax_rate' => 0.10]); // Will persist in database
```

========================================
PACKAGE INFORMATION
========================================

TITLE: Package Metadata and Requirements
DESCRIPTION: Complete package information including requirements, dependencies, and installation details.
LANGUAGE: json

```json
{
  "name": "hcart/laravel-multi-cart",
  "description": "A flexible, extensible shopping cart solution for Laravel applications with multiple cart instances and configurable storage providers",
  "keywords": ["laravel", "cart", "shopping-cart", "e-commerce", "multi-cart"],
  "homepage": "https://github.com/hcart/laravel-multi-cart",
  "license": "MIT",
  "authors": [
    {
      "name": "HCart Team",
      "email": "team@hcart.dev"
    }
  ],
  "require": {
    "php": "^8.2",
    "laravel/framework": "^11.0",
    "illuminate/support": "^11.0",
    "illuminate/database": "^11.0",
    "illuminate/cache": "^11.0"
  },
  "require-dev": {
    "pestphp/pest": "^3.0",
    "pestphp/pest-plugin-arch": "^3.0",
    "pestphp/pest-plugin-laravel": "^3.0",
    "orchestra/testbench": "^9.0",
    "phpstan/phpstan": "^1.10"
  },
  "autoload": {
    "psr-4": {
      "HCart\\LaravelMultiCart\\": "src/"
    }
  },
  "autoload-dev": {
    "psr-4": {
      "HCart\\LaravelMultiCart\\Tests\\": "tests/"
    }
  },
  "extra": {
    "laravel": {
      "providers": [
        "HCart\\LaravelMultiCart\\LaravelMultiCartServiceProvider"
      ],
      "aliases": {
        "LaravelMultiCart": "HCart\\LaravelMultiCart\\Facades\\LaravelMultiCart"
      }
    }
  },
  "minimum-stability": "dev",
  "prefer-stable": true
}
```

========================================
CHANGELOG ENTRIES
========================================

TITLE: Recent Changelog Entries
DESCRIPTION: Recent changes and improvements to the Laravel Multi-Cart package.
LANGUAGE: markdown

```markdown
# Changelog

## [1.0.0] - 2024-01-15

### Added
- Initial release of Laravel Multi-Cart package
- Multiple cart instances support
- Configurable storage providers (session, cache, database, Redis, file)
- Polymorphic relationships with Eloquent models
- PHP 8+ attributes for tax and shipping configuration
- Comprehensive event system
- Bulk operations support
- User integration with HasCarts trait
- Cartable trait for models
- Advanced tax and shipping calculations
- Piece-based shipping support
- Custom configuration callbacks
- Performance optimizations
- Comprehensive test suite (183 tests, 545 assertions)
- Complete documentation and examples

### Features
- Multi-provider cart system
- Advanced tax calculations (percentage, fixed, compound)
- Sophisticated shipping calculations (fixed, percentage, weight-based, piece-based)
- Free shipping thresholds
- Cart cloning and provider conversion
- Automatic cleanup of expired carts
- Event-driven architecture
- Type-safe implementation
- Modern PHP 8.2+ features
- Laravel 11+ compatibility

### Performance
- Database query optimization
- Bulk operation support
- Efficient caching strategies
- Memory usage optimization
- Load testing verified

### Security
- Input validation
- CSRF protection
- User authorization
- Data encryption support
- Secure session handling
```

This comprehensive llms.txt file provides complete documentation of the Laravel Multi-Cart package suitable for LLM training, covering all features, usage patterns, examples, and best practices.
